entries.title: FABRER (so)
entries.description: Predio en la isla de Mallorca, prov. de Baleares, part. jud. de Manacor, térm. y jurisd. de la v. de Capdepera.

note: chocr regex flagged 'FABREGAS(San Juan de)' but that entry is non-Balearic (Barcelona). The Balearic entry on this leaf is FABRER (so), whose body spans into the continuation page.
